modern_reader_context.market_surface_rule: Use train commute, station platform, conbini, cram school, club room, LINE-style chat, digital manga apps, capsule machines, and quiet public etiquette.
modern_reader_context.audience_story_rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture.
modern_reader_context.genre_relevance_rule: Modern healing must receive everyday overstimulation gently: notifications, transit noise, school/work fatigue, convenience rituals, and weather.

catalyst.logline: After a notification spiral, the protagonist's phone dies beside a vending machine, and the quiet ordinary world keeps going without asking them to improve.
catalyst.genre_transmutation: Device failure becomes permission to notice.

modern_reader_context.craft_directive: Fuse the genre engine with a contemporary reader-world entrypoint. Market=ja_JP; audience=gen_z. Use catalyst 'phone_off_by_the_vending_machine': After a notification spiral, the protagonist's phone dies beside a vending machine, and the quiet ordinary world keeps going without asking them to improve. Transmutation: Device failure becomes permission to notice. Market surface: Use train commute, station platform, conbini, cram school, club room, LINE-style chat, digital manga apps, capsule machines, and quiet public etiquette. Audience rule: Treat online identity, economic pressure, burnout, social performance, fandom, romance boundaries, and self-definition as ordinary life texture. Use concrete objects and social pressure on page one; do not name-drop trends.

panels.scene: A quiet strength filled the room.
panels.narration: Something shifted. For the first time she began to heal.
Not alone anymore. A new dawn. The journey had only begun.
